name: Happy Endings with Bruno
overview: RuPaul’s Drag Race Pit Crew member and long-time masseur Bruno Alcantara lays down special guests on his table for a full body massage interwoven with intimate and emotional conversations which answer the question: "What does my Happy Ending look like?" Combining the soothing elements of massage ASMR with thoughtful and often vulnerable interviews, and a rare glimpse into the personal journeys of its guests.

trailers.title: Happy Endings with Bruno | Trailer | WOW Presents Plus
